# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Web/sites
    apiVersion: '2021-02-01'
    name: [FunctionAppName]
    location: [Location]
    identity:
      type: SystemAssigned
    properties:
      serverFarmId: [AppServicePlanResourceId]
      siteConfig:
        appSettings:
          - name: FUNCTIONS_WORKER_RUNTIME
            value: dotnet
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: '2018-09-01-preview'
    name: [SubscriptionScope]/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments/[uniqueGuid]
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[concat(subscription().id, '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/ba34fe2d-46c1-4e8b-b285-9e317ca47739')]"  # Storage Blob Data Contributor
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', [FunctionAppName]), '2021-02-01').identity.principalId]"
      scope: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', [StorageAccountName])]"
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: '2018-09-01-preview'
    name: [SubscriptionScope]/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments/[uniqueGuid]
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[concat(subscription().id, '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/f74a6a3b-5b4e-4c8d-a0a2-e19e6ae0a6f0')]"  # Key Vault Contributor
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', [FunctionAppName]), '2021-02-01').identity.principalId]"
      scope: "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', [KeyVaultName])]"
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: '2018-09-01-preview'
    name: [SubscriptionScope]/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments/[uniqueGuid]
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[concat(subscription().id, '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/ddb9d4e3-f759-42c6-8c9a-22c1120f49b9')]"  # SQL DB Contributor
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', [FunctionAppName]), '2021-02-01').identity.principalId]"
      scope: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases', [SqlServerName], [SqlDatabaseName])]"
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: '2018-09-01-preview'
    name: [SubscriptionScope]/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments/[uniqueGuid]
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[concat(subscription().id, '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/fbdfdc3f-d26a-450c-a8d7-bd2e10f119fa')]"  # Cosmos DB Account Contributor
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', [FunctionAppName]), '2021-02-01').identity.principalId]"
      scope: "[resourceId('Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts', [CosmosDbAccountName])]"
